chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 753 of 2022 SCRA 754 of 2022 SCRA 755 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 26.01.2026 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2022 without any progress and fixed for orders as to non-prosecution. Even today counsel for the applicant merely seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
